lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship.

sources.label: EDSY
sources.what: Alternative outfitting planner used to cross-check the anti-Xeno hardpoint and internal fit.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Vulture ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara — Vulture
sources.what: Ship specification, base stats, and shipyard pricing for this hull.

sources.label: ED Wiki — Anti-Xeno Combat
sources.what: Guardian and AX weapon mount sizes, Thargoid Interceptor mechanics, and caustic handling for anti-Xeno fits.
